enums.h(3) Library Functions Manual enums.h(3)

NAME

enums.h - Option enum value definitions - single source of truth.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct enum_to_string_entry_t
Enum value mapping with description for shell completions. struct enum_descriptor_t
Enum value mapping for an option.

Macros


#define OPT_LOG_LEVEL_DEV 'dev'
#define OPT_LOG_LEVEL_DEBUG 'debug'
#define OPT_LOG_LEVEL_INFO 'info'
#define OPT_LOG_LEVEL_WARN 'warn'
#define OPT_LOG_LEVEL_ERROR 'error'
#define OPT_LOG_LEVEL_FATAL 'fatal'

#define OPT_COLOR_MODE_NONE 'none'
#define OPT_COLOR_MODE_16 '16'
#define OPT_COLOR_MODE_256 '256'
#define OPT_COLOR_MODE_TRUECOLOR 'truecolor'

#define OPT_COLOR_FILTER_BLACK 'black'
#define OPT_COLOR_FILTER_WHITE 'white'
#define OPT_COLOR_FILTER_GREEN 'green'
#define OPT_COLOR_FILTER_MAGENTA 'magenta'
#define OPT_COLOR_FILTER_FUCHSIA 'fuchsia'
#define OPT_COLOR_FILTER_ORANGE 'orange'
#define OPT_COLOR_FILTER_TEAL 'teal'
#define OPT_COLOR_FILTER_CYAN 'cyan'
#define OPT_COLOR_FILTER_PINK 'pink'
#define OPT_COLOR_FILTER_RED 'red'
#define OPT_COLOR_FILTER_YELLOW 'yellow'
#define OPT_COLOR_FILTER_RAINBOW 'rainbow'
#define OPT_PALETTE_STANDARD 'standard'
#define OPT_PALETTE_BLOCKS 'blocks'
#define OPT_PALETTE_DIGITAL 'digital'
#define OPT_PALETTE_MINIMAL 'minimal'
#define OPT_PALETTE_COOL 'cool'
#define OPT_PALETTE_CUSTOM 'custom'
#define OPT_RENDER_MODE_FOREGROUND 'foreground'
#define OPT_RENDER_MODE_FG 'fg'
#define OPT_RENDER_MODE_BACKGROUND 'background'
#define OPT_RENDER_MODE_BG 'bg'
#define OPT_RENDER_MODE_HALF_BLOCK 'half-block'
#define OPT_RECONNECT_OFF 'off'
#define OPT_RECONNECT_AUTO 'auto'
#define OPT_AUDIO_SOURCE_AUTO 'auto'
#define OPT_AUDIO_SOURCE_MIC 'mic'
#define OPT_AUDIO_SOURCE_MEDIA 'media'
#define OPT_AUDIO_SOURCE_BOTH 'both'

Functions


const enum_to_string_entry_t * options_get_enum_entries (const char *option_name, size_t *entry_count)
Get enum entries with descriptions for an option. const char ** options_get_enum_values (const char *option_name, size_t *value_count)
Get enum values for an option. bool options_is_enum_option (const char *option_name)
Check if an option has enum values.

Detailed Description

Option enum value definitions - single source of truth.

Defines all enum values for options in one place so they can be used by:

  • Option parsers
  • Help text generation
  • Shell completions (bash/fish/zsh/powershell)
  • Configuration file validation

This ensures consistency across all parts of the application.

Definition in file enums.h.

Function Documentation

const enum_to_string_entry_t * options_get_enum_entries (const char * option_name, size_t * entry_count)

Get enum entries with descriptions for an option. Returns entries containing both string values and descriptions for shell completion.

Parameters

option_name Option long name (e.g., "log-level")
entry_count OUTPUT: Number of entries returned

Returns

Array of enum entries, or NULL if not an enum option

Get enum entries with descriptions for an option.

Returns entries containing both string values and descriptions for shell completion. Used by zsh completion to show descriptions alongside values.

Parameters

option_name Option long name (e.g., "log-level")
entry_count OUTPUT: Number of entries returned

Returns

Array of enum entries, or NULL if not an enum option

Definition at line 134 of file enums.c.

134                                                                                                      {
135   if (!option_name || !entry_count) {
136     return NULL;
137   }
138 
139   for (size_t i = 0; enum_registry[i].option_name != NULL; i++) {
140     if (strcmp(enum_registry[i].option_name, option_name) == 0) {
141       /* Count entries up to terminator */
142       size_t count = 0;
143       for (size_t j = 0; enum_registry[i].map[j].enum_value != -1; j++) {
144         count++;
145       }
146       *entry_count = count;
147       return enum_registry[i].map;
148     }
149   }
150 
151   *entry_count = 0;
152   return NULL;
153 }








const
  char ** options_get_enum_values (const char * option_name, size_t *
  value_count)


Get enum values for an option.


Parameters


option_name Option long name (e.g.,
  "log-level")


value_count OUTPUT: Number of values returned


Returns


Array of valid string values, or NULL if not an enum
  option


Get enum values for an option.




Extracts the list of valid string values for an enum option. For
    options with aliases (like render-mode which has "foreground" and
    "fg"), both values are included.




Parameters


option_name Option long name (e.g.,
  "log-level")


value_count OUTPUT: Number of values returned


Returns


Array of valid string values, or NULL if not an enum
  option


Definition at line 166 of file enums.c.


166                                                                                    {
167   if (!option_name || !value_count) {
168     return NULL;
169   }
170 
171   /* Find the option's mapping in the registry */
172   const enum_map_descriptor_t *descriptor = NULL;
173   for (size_t i = 0; enum_registry[i].option_name != NULL; i++) {
174     if (strcmp(enum_registry[i].option_name, option_name) == 0) {
175       descriptor = &enum_registry[i];
176       break;
177     }
178   }
179 
180   if (!descriptor || !descriptor->map) {
181     *value_count = 0;
182     return NULL;
183   }
184 
185   /* Count non-terminator entries */
186   size_t count = 0;
187   for (size_t i = 0; descriptor->map[i].enum_value != -1; i++) {
188     count++;
189   }
190 
191   /* Build array of unique strings (skip duplicates from aliases) */
192   const char **values = SAFE_MALLOC(count * sizeof(const char *), const char **);
193   size_t unique_count = 0;
194 
195   for (size_t i = 0; descriptor->map[i].enum_value != -1; i++) {
196     const char *str = descriptor->map[i].string;
197 
198     /* Check if we already have this string (for aliases) */
199     bool already_added = false;
200     for (size_t j = 0; j < unique_count; j++) {
201       if (strcmp(values[j], str) == 0) {
202         already_added = true;
203         break;
204       }
205     }
206 
207     if (!already_added) {
208       values[unique_count++] = str;
209     }
210   }
211 
212   *value_count = unique_count;
213   return values;
214 }






References enum_to_string_entry_t::enum_value,
    enum_map_descriptor_t::map, SAFE_MALLOC, and
    enum_to_string_entry_t::string.


Referenced by asciichat_suggest_enum_value().






bool options_is_enum_option (const char *
  option_name)


Check if an option has enum values.


Parameters


option_name Option long name


Returns


true if option has enum values, false otherwise


Definition at line 222 of file enums.c.


222                                                      {
223   if (!option_name) {
224     return false;
225   }
226 
227   for (size_t i = 0; enum_registry[i].option_name != NULL; i++) {
228     if (strcmp(enum_registry[i].option_name, option_name) == 0) {
229       return true;
230     }
231   }
232 
233   return false;
234 }
